ogTitle: Dowar Islet vs Downsfield: Climate Safety

heading: Dowar Islet vs Downsfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dowar Islet, Queensland and Downsfield, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dowar Islet has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Downsfield (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dowar Islet or Downsfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dowar Islet has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Downsfield scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dowar Islet scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Downsfield scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dowar Islet or Downsfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dowar Islet has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
